summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SkyView Drone Photography website. Backend APIs are 100% functional. Frontend UI works well with one minor overlay issue on chat widget.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat toggle button blocked by Emergent badge overlay
ui_bugs.workaround: Chat API works perfectly, only UI click is blocked

passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Home page loads with hero, services, stats sections
Navigation between pages (Portfolio, Pricing, Contact, Booking)
Contact form submission with success confirmation
Booking page package selection and navigation
Chat API integration with Claude Sonnet 4.5
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chat widget overlay issue - Emergent badge is intercepting clicks on chat toggle button. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning.
